title: pfaffia guianensis
intro: Pfaffia guianensis, also known as Suma, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, characterized by its long taproot and sprawling stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and adaptogenic effects. The health benefits of Pfaffia guianensis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, capsules, and extracts, which are often used to promote overall well-being and vitality.
